### Report drug and cell line info
### Kewalin Samart
### Last modified: 08/25/2025

```{r report number of cell lines per drug}
library(readr)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
# read in sig info table
sig_info = read_tsv(here("data/v2/drug_info/GSE92742_Broad_LINCS_sig_info.txt"))
median_cellline_count <- sig_info %>%
  group_by(pert_iname) %>%
  summarise(cellline_count = n()) %>%
  summarise(median_count = median(cellline_count))
print(median_cellline_count)
```
